final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original movie poster for a sci-fi thriller about AI awakening.

Style/medium: cinematic movie poster, photorealistic digital composite, cyberpunk aesthetic inspired by Blade Runner and Ghost in the Shell
Composition: vertical centered portrait orientation, subject positioned in lower two-thirds with title area reserved in bottom third, eye-level straight-on gaze at viewer, tight framing on face
Subject: half-human half-cyborg female face, left side delicate human skin with natural brown eye, right side exposed precision circuit boards and metallic endoskeleton, seamless transition along vertical centerline, glowing blue mechanical eye
Scene/backdrop: vast digital matrix space, countless streams of green code falling from above like digital rain, deep atmospheric void
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast key light from front, rim lighting defining the mechanical contours, moody and suspenseful with technological menace
Color palette: cool blue as dominant base, acid green code streams as accent, metallic silver and chrome highlights, warm brown human eye as focal anchor
Materials/textures: realistic human skin with subtle pores, brushed aluminum and steel mechanical parts, visible copper traces and fiber optic cables, glossy synthetic surfaces
Text (verbatim): ""
Constraints: title text area must remain empty in bottom third; vertical poster format; photorealistic render quality suitable for theatrical release
Avoid: cartoonish or anime stylization; flat graphic design; deformed facial features; mismatched lighting between human and mechanical sides; oversaturated neon palette; watermarks
